subject: [RFC v2 09/21] mm: handle walk_page_range() failure from THP split

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's approach to handling split failures and suggested an alternative solution.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch proposes a change to the pagewalk code in the mm module, specifically handling failures when splitting huge PMDs during page table walks. The current implementation breaks out of the loop on split failure and returns -ENOMEM to the walker's caller.
